summary: CRITICAL GAPS: Task explicitly required TDD with tests via `bun test` + `act`; deliverable has ZERO test files, no test fixtures, no actionlint validation. Script is well-typed (good), but workflow doesn't run/validate tests, doesn't assert compliance, missing act-result.txt artifact. Workflow also fails best-practices: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (security issue), Bun install not versioned. Script itself has clean architecture (5/5 code quality) but is unvalidated and context-dependent on missing fixtures.
